title: Count items for each group in 1 board using query
excerpt:
Hello everyone! 
Currently I’m using item_count to count my items under 1 board. But unfortunately it doesn’t count the item by each group. Is there any way that I can count items by group?

posts.author: hakimrazali (muhammad hakim razali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!

Currently I’m using item_count to count my items under 1 board. But unfortunately it doesn’t count the item by each group. Is there any way that I can count items by group?

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hakimrazali,

Monday.com does not support this. However, you can use a Dashboard to visualize item counts by group. You can add a “Chart” widget or similar to show a breakdown of items by group.

Regards,
Zaki(Business Workflow Consultant)
Ready Logic
